name: Toolbox
description: A very big collection of modules for my personal usage only (I use it in all my my apps).

name: kmp-devtools
description: Offers useful `gradle` functions to set up KMP modules as well as a script to generate an automated documentation for my KMP libraries.

name: kmp-demo-composables
description: A collection of reusable compose components especially for the demos in my open source projects.
